assessment.assessment_type: SAQ D (Service Provider) - draft evidence support
assessment.cde_summary: Tokenized card acceptance; segmented CDE; no SAD stored post-authorization.

evidence.description: H1 2026 network security control review sign-off
Q2 2026 passing ASV attestation from approved scanning vendor

controls.description: Annual segmentation and application penetration test

evidence.description: 2025 annual penetration test report and remediation closure

controls.description: Daily audit-log review of CDE systems
Cryptographic key-management procedures and key custodian records
Periodic (6-monthly) user access review of CDE

evidence.description: H2 2025 access review (now past the 180-day window)

controls.description: Targeted risk analysis for customized/periodic controls

evidence.description: Targeted risk analysis (now past the 365-day window)

controls.description: Sensitive authentication data (SAD) not stored after authorization

evidence.description: Documented justification and data-flow evidence that SAD is not retained

requirements.title: Network security controls reviewed at least every six months
External vulnerability scans performed by an ASV quarterly
Penetration testing methodology defined and executed
Audit logs reviewed to identify anomalies or suspicious activity
Procedures to protect cryptographic keys are defined and implemented
User accounts and access privileges reviewed periodically
Targeted risk analysis performed for applicable requirements
Media with cardholder data physically secured
Sensitive authentication data not stored after authorization
requirements.na_justification: Service does not retain SAD post-authorization; validated by data-flow evidence EV-010
